checkout.title: Checkout
checkout.guestHint: You can place an order without registration.
checkout.loggedInHint: You can use your account details for this order or enter different ones.
checkout.useNewDetails: Enter different details for this order
checkout.accountNoAddressHint: No saved address in your profile — fill in delivery below.
checkout.noShipping: No shipping options. Configure them in Medusa Admin (Settings → Regions or Locations & shipping).
checkout.noPaymentProviders: Payment providers are not available. Ensure your publishable key has a sales channel and providers are enabled for the region.
checkout.errorCod: Payment on delivery is not configured in this region.
checkout.errorStripe: Stripe is not configured in this region.
checkout.errorStripeFlow: Stripe flow is not wired yet. Choose payment on delivery for now.

order.adminNote: The order is now visible in Medusa Admin (Orders).

register.title: Create account
register.hint: Required fields: First name, Last name, Country, Postal code, Email, Phone.

sidebar.title: Catalog
sidebar.pickRegionHint: Choose a region on the home page — the catalog will open with prices in RSD or EUR.
sidebar.noCategoriesHint: No categories yet. Create them in the admin: Products → Categories, then assign each product to a category.

home.title: Men’s clothing and accessories
home.subtitle: Choose your delivery country — catalog and prices in dinars (RSD) or euros (EUR).
home.serbiaDesc: Prices in RSD · delivery in Serbia
home.montenegroDesc: Prices in EUR · delivery in Montenegro

catalog.emptyDefault: No products for this region yet.
catalog.emptyCategoryMissing: Category not found or products are not in this category.
catalog.emptyCategory: No products in «{name}» yet. In the admin open the product → Categories and add this category, or pick another category in the menu.
